message:
fix(engine): parser language expansion (let/const, named/namespace imports) and correctness fixes

Extend parser to support let/const variable declarations and named/namespace
import forms ({a, b as c}, * as ns, default+named). Add ES2020 static-semantics
error taxonomy (22 codes) and wire lexical binding conflict detection through
IR0-to-IR1 lowering. Fix proxy deleteProperty over-rejection on non-extensible
targets, improvement_millionths inversion in constrained benchmark lane,
throughput regression variable mismatch in control-plane split gate, and
blank-to-None normalization in TUI adapter. Update fixture hash to reflect
new VariableDeclarationKind::Let parse output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
